phases.title: Core Editor
phases.summary: Konva.js canvas editor with shape tools, selection, transformation, property editing, and background image support.

phases.title: Exhibitor Booths
phases.summary: First-class booth elements with domain-specific properties (booth code, assigned exhibitor, area calculation).

phases.title: Attendee-Facing Map Viewer
phases.summary: Read-only interactive viewer with pan/zoom, booth click-to-detail, search/highlight, exhibitor list, and responsive mobile layout.

phases.title: Additional Editor Tools
phases.summary: Grid, snap-to-grid, undo/redo, copy/paste, multi-select, import/export, and additional drawing tools.

phases.title: Layer System & Background Rethink
phases.summary: Fixed layer architecture (Background, Content, Pathing, Markup) with visibility toggles, z-ordering, canvas resize, and background color.
tasks: Fixed layer architecture (Background, Content, Pathing, Markup)

phases.title: Walkable Layer (Editor)
phases.summary: Authoring system for defining walkable and impassable regions on the floor plan — the data foundation for wayfinding.
tasks: Persist walkable grid in floor plan data

phases.title: Wayfinding: Pathfinding (Viewer)
phases.summary: A* pathfinding on the walkable grid. Pick a start and destination by booth/exhibitor name or tap-on-map, get a visual route.
tasks: Start / destination picker (booth name or tap)

phases.title: Scale Calibration & Real Dimensions
phases.summary: Two-point scale calibration tool so maps have real-world units. Booth areas in sq ft/m, scale bar on canvas.
tasks: Booth area display in real units

phases.title: New Drawing Tools, Labels & Opacity
phases.summary: Arrow and arc tools, full label customization (color, position, font, hide/show), and per-element opacity.

phases.title: Session Locations & Meeting Rooms
phases.summary: First-class session and meeting room elements in the editor and viewer, with their own search and interactions.

phases.title: Legend Persistence & Customization
phases.summary: Configurable, persisted legend with custom entries, colors, positioning, and optional category filtering in the viewer.
tasks: Persist legend in floor plan data

phases.title: Auto-Generate Booths
phases.summary: Quickly populate a floor plan with a grid of booths — configurable size, spacing, labeling pattern, with live preview.
tasks: Place generated booths as editable elements

phases.title: Editor Polish & Validation
phases.summary: Middle-click pan, visual undo history, hover states, booth placement validation rules, and coordinate display.
tasks: Hover state feedback on canvas elements

phases.title: Backend Integration
phases.summary: Connect to the PheedLoop backend — save/load maps, link booths to real exhibitors, sessions to talks, and ship the viewer in-app.
tasks: Save / load floor plans via PheedLoop API
Link booths to real exhibitor records
Link session elements to talk records
Embed viewer in PheedLoop attendee app
